motifs.name: Parang Barong Seling Nitik
motifs.prompt: Create a piece of batik cloth featuring intricate geometric patterns with alternating brown, black, and white colors. The design includes nested circles, squares, and linear patterns creating depth and movement. Traditional batik design with repetitive geometric patterns featuring circles, lines, and crosshatches in symmetrical arrangement with brown, white, black, and blue accents.

motifs.name: Parang Kusuma Seling Parang Plenik Gapit
motifs.prompt: Create a detailed batik cloth with a mix of geometric and abstract patterns in warm tones. Features complex pattern of interlocking geometric shapes including triangles, squares, circles, and abstract forms resembling leaves or branches in shades of brown, beige, and red creating dynamic visual texture.

motifs.name: Parang Barong Seling Parang Baladewa
motifs.prompt: Create a batik cloth design with elongated leaf-like shapes, scattered dots, and a mix of brown, beige, and white colors inspired by nature and cultural motifs. Features abstract shapes including elongated ovals, circles, and various geometric forms with small black dots scattered throughout creating detailed organic pattern.

motifs.name: Parang Baladewa
motifs.prompt: Create a piece of batik cloth featuring repeated cloud or leaf-shaped motifs with detailed textures and borders using combination of black, gold, and red colors. Traditional batik pattern featuring repeated cloud or leaf shapes in gold and red on black background with intricate designs creating elegant repetitive pattern.

motifs.name: Parang Gendreh Seling Parang Sisik
motifs.prompt: Create a detailed batik cloth featuring a mix of elongated forms, dots, and geometric patterns in brown, beige, and white. The pattern consists of various shapes including elongated forms, dots, and geometric patterns arranged in repetitive manner creating complex and intricate design against brown background.

motifs.name: Parang Gendreh Seling Parang Gapit Klitik
motifs.prompt: Create a digital artwork featuring complex repetitive pattern of elongated organic shapes resembling leaves or petals set against background of brown and beige tones. Detailed batik cloth with abstract leaf-like shapes and geometric patterns in earthy tones arranged in grid-like structure creating intricate texture.

motifs.name: Parang Tuding
motifs.prompt: Create a complex geometric pattern with mix of squares, triangles, circles, and lines in black, brown, white, and orange inspired by traditional batik designs. Detailed batik cloth featuring intricate geometric patterns including interconnected lines, squares, circles, and various abstract shapes in brown and black creating dense interwoven network.

motifs.name: Gandasuli
motifs.prompt: Create a detailed abstract pattern with organic shapes and circular elements. Features intricate batik cloth with abstract shapes resembling leaves or feathers, small circles, and lines forming complex organic design in black, orange, white, and red. Swirling lines, circular patterns, and geometric forms create visually striking batik motif with dark brown and orange hues with white accents.

motifs.name: Parang Templek Latar Ireng
motifs.prompt: Create a piece of batik cloth with detailed geometric pattern consisting of interlocking triangles, zigzag lines, and diamond shapes in shades of brown, black, and white. Complex geometric pattern featuring interlocking shapes and lines creating visually striking and intricate design with repetitive elements arranged throughout fabric.

motifs.name: Parang Kapri
motifs.prompt: Generate a digital artwork depicting richly patterned batik fabric with mix of geometric shapes, swirling lines, and abstract forms in deep red and earthy tones. Complex and intricate pattern featuring repetitive motif consisting of interconnected shapes and lines primarily in shades of red and brown with small circular elements within larger shapes creating network-like structure.

motifs.name: Parang Sawut Seling Puspa
motifs.prompt: Create a detailed batik cloth with black background, white and brown geometric shapes, floral motifs, and abstract forms. Intricate patterns featuring geometric shapes like squares and circles, floral motifs including flowers and leaves, and abstract forms with curves and swirls. Detailed ornate design featuring stylized elephants with intricate trunks and tusks surrounded by geometric shapes and floral elements in black, white, brown, and gold.

motifs.name: Parang Klitik Kesit
motifs.prompt: Create a close-up image of batik cloth with complex pattern consisting of straight lines, curved lines, and circular shapes using shades of brown and beige. Detailed and intricate batik pattern featuring mix of straight, curved, and circular shapes arranged in repetitive manner creating visually complex design with earthy color palette.

motifs.name: Parang Rusak
motifs.prompt: Create a classic batik featuring the iconic Parang Rusak motif with bold diagonal patterns resembling breaking waves. The design uses deep indigo blue against cream background symbolizing power and authority worn by Javanese royalty with flowing geometric patterns creating dynamic movement.

motifs.name: Parang Barong
motifs.prompt: Design an elegant batik pattern called Parang Barong featuring larger and more prominent diagonal blade-like patterns. This sacred motif was traditionally reserved for sultans rendered in rich brown and golden yellow tones with bold geometric precision and cultural significance.

motifs.name: Parang Klitik
motifs.prompt: Craft a sophisticated batik with Parang Klitik motif displaying smaller more delicate diagonal patterns that create subtle visual movement. The design uses navy blue and white color palette with intricate detailing and refined geometric arrangements creating elegant texture.

motifs.name: Parang Kusumo
motifs.prompt: Generate a refined batik pattern featuring Parang Kusumo combining the classic diagonal parang structure with floral kusuma elements. The motif uses gradients from deep blue to soft cream representing the harmony of strength and beauty with intricate floral geometric integration.

motifs.name: Parang Sobrah
motifs.prompt: Create an intricate batik design inspired by Parang Sobrah with dense diagonal patterns that symbolize courage and determination. The composition uses traditional brown, indigo, and cream colors with bold geometric precision creating powerful visual statement.

motifs.name: Parang Curigo
motifs.prompt: Design a contemporary batik featuring modernized Parang Curigo motif with diagonal dagger-like patterns that represent warrior spirit and protection. Use bold colors of black, gold, and deep red for dramatic effect creating striking cultural symbolism.

motifs.name: Parang Seling
motifs.prompt: Craft a luxurious batik pattern called Parang Seling featuring alternating diagonal parang rows with contrasting colors. The design symbolizes balance and duality using navy blue, golden brown, and ivory white creating harmonious visual rhythm with cultural depth.

motifs.name: Parang Menang
motifs.prompt: Generate a sophisticated batik featuring Parang Menang motif with victorious wave-like diagonal patterns that slope towards victory. The pattern uses powerful colors of deep indigo, burnt sienna, and cream symbolizing triumph and success in traditional Javanese philosophy.

motifs.name: Parang Gondosuli
motifs.prompt: Design an elegant batik pattern featuring Parang Gondosuli combining the classic parang diagonal structure with intricate mythical creature elements. The design represents spiritual protection using rich colors of burgundy, gold, and deep blue creating mystical cultural symbolism.

motifs.name: Parang Abstract Geometric
motifs.prompt: Create a piece of batik cloth with complex and intricate design featuring squiggly lines, circles, and squares in shades of brown and white. Abstract shapes and lines in various shades creating detailed pattern with complex arrangement of geometric shapes and abstract forms against dark background with batik-inspired design.

motifs.name: Parang Modern Fusion
motifs.prompt: Design a contemporary batik pattern blending traditional Parang diagonal structures with modern geometric abstraction. Features bold angular lines intersecting with organic curves in deep earth tones of brown, black, and cream creating innovative cultural fusion design.

motifs.name: Parang Kawung Combination
motifs.prompt: Create a sophisticated batik combining Parang diagonal patterns with Kawung circular motifs. The design integrates traditional sacred geometries in rich brown, gold, and indigo colors representing the union of different royal batik traditions with intricate cultural layering.

motifs.name: Parang Nitik Fusion
motifs.prompt: Generate an intricate batik featuring Parang diagonal patterns alternating with dense Nitik dotting technique. The composition uses traditional brown and cream color scheme with meticulous geometric precision creating textured visual depth and cultural authenticity.
